generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that 78% of European citizens now support strategic autonomy? The recent cyberattacks on critical infrastructure show why we can't rely on others for our security. Investing in our own defense isn't just about strength—it's about protecting our families and way of life. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
